name: The Shadowed Scribe

sheet.name: The Shadowed Scribe
sheet.background_story:
A malevolent sorcerer who journeys across the forsaken lands under the guise of an apprentice scribe. In this role, he often scouts ahead through perilous lands under as a missionary of sorts, gaining their associated protections.

His reputation as a scribe has allowed him access to protected archives and the forgotten tomes within.

He speaks of the arrival of the next cycle and aims to prepare all to meet their fate... often performing the act himself.
